item.title: What will Andy Burnham’s VAT cut on electricity bills mean for you?
item.summary: New prime minister is implementing immediate tax cut to help ease cost of living pressures for British households Andy Burnham to cut VAT on electricity bills as first cost of living move Household electricity bills for people in Great Britain will not attract VAT for six months , under the first of a series of cost of living measures announced by the new prime minister, Andy Burnham. Continue reading...
